message:
feat: layout restoration engine — recreate split topology from snapshot (wa-e6pq)

Add restore_layout.rs: LayoutRestorer that recreates window/tab/pane split
topology from TopologySnapshot using WeztermInterface spawn/split_pane calls.
Recursive pane tree descent with PaneIdMap (old→new pane ID mapping), CWD
normalization (file:// URI handling), configurable split ratios, and
continue-on-error resilience. 27 tests covering single pane, H/V splits,
nested grids, multi-tab/window, 3-way splits, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
